title: LineInspector Search
description:
LineInspector Search

LineInspector Search

The image below shows part of an object with a defect.

The LineInspector finds the defect as shown below.  Note that each edge search position distance from the line being inspected must exceed either the DefectLevelThreshPos or DefectLevelThreshNeg property values for a defect to be found.  Also, the defect area must be greater then MinArea and less then MaxArea.
